reasoning: Benzyl butyl phthalate is a diester of phthalic acid (1,2-benzenedicarboxylic acid) with one benzyl and one butyl ester group, making it a phthalate ester. Phthalate esters derived from the para isomer designation in ChemOnt maps to p-Phthalate esters, though structurally this is an ortho-phthalate; the closest available label is p-Phthalate esters under benzoic acids and derivatives.
